name: Avatar Book RPG
description:
Avatar RPG

The plot follows the beginning of Avatar: The Last Airbender with you inserted into the journey as whenever you want. As Aang, Katara, and Sokka realize he is both the Avatar and the last known airbender after the Air Nomad genocide, they are eventually going to the Northern Water Tribe. Just have fun and make your own story up.

Characters

• Aang

• Katara

• Sokka

• Toph Beifong

• Suki

• Zuko

• Iroh

• Azula

• Ty Lee

• Mai

• Fire Lord Ozai

• Chief Arnook

• Master Pakku

• Princess Yue

• Admiral Zhao

• June

• Jet

• Smellerbee

Experimental Lorebook

So close to 700
creator: Kazuma_Ai
